title: 2024 GNCC Open Championship
content:
# 2024 GNCC Open Championship

#### [View the Draw](https://links.tccnc.club/gnccopendraw)  
![gnccopenlogo](/images/Bonspiels/gnccopenlogo.png)

### Was March 21–24, 2024

\---Archived Info----

Join us in the Triangle for The 2024 GNCC Open Championship!

* $480 per team
* Up to 32-teams
* Open format - any team as long as each player is a current GNCC member
* 3-game guarantee
* First draw: 6:30 P.M. on Thursday. Last draw: 1:30 P.M. on Sunday (assuming a full 32-team event)
* All meals (Thursday dinner through Sunday lunch) included. Breakfast provided at the host hotel.
* Beer, wine, and soda available at our cashless bar (only credit cards and mobile payments accepted).
* All draws will be live streamed online - [www.youtube.com/trianglecurling](https://www.youtube.com/trianglecurling)
* Questions? [contact email]

### Triangle Club Teams

* Lottery for 5 Triangle Curling Club teams
* Teams will be selected via a random lottery on February 25, 2024.
* Any team with 3 or more Triangle Curling members is considered a Triangle team.
* **Do not register on the website.** To be entered into the lottery, send your full team roster to [contact email].

### COVID-19

As of December 31, 2022, there is no longer a COVID-19 vaccination requirement in place for our club.

However, our Health and Safety Committee strongly encourages you not to attend this event and to find a replacment if you are feeling unwell.

### Where

Triangle Curling Club  
2310 So Hi Drive  
Durham, NC 27703

Fly into RDU airport, less than 15 minutes from Triangle Curling Club.

### Host Hotel

Courtyard Raleigh-Durham Airport/Brier Creek for 119 USD - 129 USD per night

* Start Date: Thursday, March 21, 2024
* End Date: Sunday, March 24, 2024
* Last Day to Book: Wednesday, February 21, 2024
* **[Book your group rate for Triangle Curling Club](https://www.marriott.com/events/start.mi?id=1704483446678&key=GRP)**

### Payment and Cancellation Policy

Payment is required upon registration. PayPal is our payments provider, which accepts all major credit cards from most countries.

Cancellations received before February 29, 2024 will be processed and you will receive a full refund. Cancellations received between February 29 and March 14, 2024 will be processed, and you will receive a full refund if we are able to find a replacement team. Cancellations received after March 14 will be processed, but you will not receive any refund.

### Explore the Area!

* [Food and Wine Mag: Explores the Triangle ](https://www.foodandwine.com/research-triangle-north-carolina-what-to-eat-and-drink-7108205)
* [Ultimate Durham Checklist](https://durhammag.com/the-ultimate-durham-checklist/)
* [Duke Gardens](https://gardens.duke.edu/)
* [Durham: Kingdom of Cool](https://www.atlantamagazine.com/southbound-articles/durham-north-carolina/)
* [Discover Durham: Beer Scene](https://www.discoverdurham.com/food-drink/breweries/)

## History

* 2023: Utica Curling Club ([watch the finals](https://youtu.be/AOhQ0zySKSU))

### Questions?

Your 2024 GNCC Open Championship co-chairs are Dave Zimmerman and Trevor Gau. Please reach out if you have any questions.  
[contact email]
